title: In Romania, Hard-Hit by Covid, Doctors Fight Vaccine Refusal
content: An anti-vaccine clarion call by leading religious figures, echoed by prominent politicians and social media, helps explain why Romania now has the world’s highest Covid death rate.
en_title: In Romania, Hard-Hit by Covid, Doctors Fight Vaccine Refusal
en_content: An anti-vaccine clarion call by leading religious figures, echoed by prominent politicians and social media, helps explain why Romania now has the world’s highest Covid death rate.

title: To Steer China’s Future, Xi Is Rewriting Its Past
content: A new official summation of Communist Party history is likely to exalt Xi Jinping as a peer of Mao and Deng, fortifying his claim to a new phase in power.
en_title: To Steer China’s Future, Xi Is Rewriting Its Past
en_content: A new official summation of Communist Party history is likely to exalt Xi Jinping as a peer of Mao and Deng, fortifying his claim to a new phase in power.

title: Nicaragua Descends Into Autocratic Rule as Ortega Crushes Dissent
content: President Daniel Ortega quashed the opposition and struck fear in voters, all but guaranteeing his victory in a presidential contest on Sunday.

more_info.byline: By Yubelka Mendoza and Natalie Kitroeff
des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_title: Nicaragua Descends Into Autocratic Rule as Ortega Crushes Dissent
en_content: President Daniel Ortega quashed the opposition and struck fear in voters, all but guaranteeing his victory in a presidential contest on Sunday.

title: Fears of Wider Instability in Iraq After Attack on Prime Minister’s Home
content: Armed drones struck the Iraqi prime minister’s home in what was seen as a warning as Iranian-backed groups dispute the results of parliamentary elections.
en_title: Fears of Wider Instability in Iraq After Attack on Prime Minister’s Home
en_content: Armed drones struck the Iraqi prime minister’s home in what was seen as a warning as Iranian-backed groups dispute the results of parliamentary elections.

title: International travelers eagerly await reunions with their loved ones as the U.S. travel changes near.
content: On Monday, travelers from many other countries who are fully vaccinated against the coronavirus will be allowed to enter the United States.
en_title: International travelers eagerly await reunions with their loved ones as the U.S. travel changes near.
en_content: On Monday, travelers from many other countries who are fully vaccinated against the coronavirus will be allowed to enter the United States.

title: When the Taliban Are in Your Bedroom
content: As armed Taliban inspected the New York Times bureau in Kabul, they were escorted by a journalist who used to be a U.S. Marine. The photo of him in uniform was plain for all to see, and ponder.

title: Police Officer Stabbed on French Riviera, Authorities Say
content: Gérald Darmanin, France’s interior minister, said an assailant had stabbed an officer in Cannes. The motive for the attack was not immediately clear.

en_title: Police Officer Stabbed on French Riviera, Authorities Say
en_content: Gérald Darmanin, France’s interior minister, said an assailant had stabbed an officer in Cannes. The motive for the attack was not immediately clear.

title: Afghan Military Pilots, on the Run, Feel Abandoned by U.S.
content: Detained in Tajikistan, or hiding from the Taliban in Afghanistan, many pilots wonder why the military that trained them is not coming to their aid.

des_facet: United States Defense and Military Forces

en_title: Afghan Military Pilots, on the Run, Feel Abandoned by U.S.
en_content: Detained in Tajikistan, or hiding from the Taliban in Afghanistan, many pilots wonder why the military that trained them is not coming to their aid.

title: Veteran U.S. Diplomat Comes Under Criticism for a Trip to Myanmar
content: Bill Richardson, a former ambassador to the U.N., said that he had held “productive” talks with the general who led the February coup. Rights activists said he gave the junta an air of legitimacy.

des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_content: Bill Richardson, a former ambassador to the U.N., said that he had held “productive” talks with the general who led the February coup. Rights activists said he gave the junta an air of legitimacy.

title: French Clerical Abuse Report Puts Spotlight on Confession
content: In rare instances, it noted, the secrecy around the sacrament had been used to cover up abuse cases, again raising issues of whether church or state law should prevail.

title: On Spain’s Camino de Santiago, Even Óscar the Donkey Is a Pilgrim
content: An artist and an innkeeper have enlisted the help of a burro in their effort to rescue the traditions of Spain’s ancient pilgrimage route from mass tourism (and selfies).

en_content: An artist and an innkeeper have enlisted the help of a burro in their effort to rescue the traditions of Spain’s ancient pilgrimage route from mass tourism (and selfies).

title: Spanish Police Seek Missing Plane Passengers After Emergency Landing
content: More than 20 people fled a Moroccan flight that diverted to Mallorca after a passenger apparently fell ill. A dozen had yet to be found.
en_title: Spanish Police Seek Missing Plane Passengers After Emergency Landing
en_content: More than 20 people fled a Moroccan flight that diverted to Mallorca after a passenger apparently fell ill. A dozen had yet to be found.

title: First Black Woman in Bundestag Wants to Change Image of ‘Germanness’
content: After a deadly racist attack, Awet Tesfaiesus considered leaving Germany. Instead, she ran for Parliament with a “courage to change” slogan and won.
en_title: First Black Woman in Bundestag Wants to Change Image of ‘Germanness’
en_content: After a deadly racist attack, Awet Tesfaiesus considered leaving Germany. Instead, she ran for Parliament with a “courage to change” slogan and won.

title: What’s in a Name? For the Koreans of Sakhalin, an Anguished History
content: Stranded for decades on the island in Russia’s Far East, some bear three names, Japanese, Russian and Korean, representing different historical chapters. Now, many are planning their return.

en_title: Antarctica Was Once a Land of Fire and Not Ice
en_content: Charcoal recovered from a dig near the southern continent shows that the region wasn’t spared from the era scientists call a “super fire world.”

title: A fire in Covid intensive care ward kills 11 people in India.

title: Costa Rica moves to require Covid shots for children.
content: The Central American nation’s health ministry said on Friday it was adding Covid-19 to the list of required vaccinations for people 18 and younger.
en_title: Costa Rica moves to require Covid shots for children.

title: Facing a spike in infections, Austria sharpens the rules of its Covid pass.
content: Austrians will need proof of vaccination or a past infection to be seated at a restaurant, enter a bar, visit a hairdresser or join any gathering of more than 25 people.
en_title: Facing a spike in infections, Austria sharpens the rules of its Covid pass.
en_content: Austrians will need proof of vaccination or a past infection to be seated at a restaurant, enter a bar, visit a hairdresser or join any gathering of more than 25 people.
